\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]
Which says a lot, since I had a lot…I mean a lot of sex.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] So I finally did it!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I became a full blown prostitute.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] There’s no turning back now.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But now that I have already fucked a stranger, I don’t know why I was making such a big deal of it.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] It’s just sex. Pure and simple.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] What’s wrong with having fun and making some money from it?!\c[0])
(\c[23]Jane was trying her best to come up with excuses to justify her action.\c[0])
(\c[23]But it’s also true that she didn’t feel as guilty as she would have before.\c[0])
(\c[23]She already became too corrupted for that.\c[0])
(\c[23]Although, there was one thing that kept bugging her.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Am I a bad girlfriend for cheating on Alex?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Oh well! What he doesn’t know won’t hurt him.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] So let’s just keep that side of me hidden from him.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Well, I did give him some hints about the types of work I do.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But that didn’t stop him from dating me.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] So maybe he is okay with it.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I should have a talk with him when I meet him later.\c[0])

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]
Don’t tell me I made you speechless with my extraordinary performance.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
As if. I was just taking a rest.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]
There you go.
(\c[23]He sent the pictures over wifi.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks, appreciate it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Anyway, I think we spend enough time in the room for people to think we were having sex. Wouldn’t you agree?

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]
Ha.ha, funny.

\c[2]Miguel:\c[0]
But you are right. We should get going before some cops barge in here.
\><CENTER>With that said, both of them cleaned up, got dressed
